gui.workers.command.tooltip.place_field: Places a Crop field on the position you are pointing at.
gui.workers.command.tooltip.place_lumber: Places a Lumber Area on the position you are pointing at.
gui.workers.command.tooltip.place_fishin: Places a Fishing Area on the position you are pointing at.
gui.workers.command.tooltip.place_mine: Places a Mining Area on the position you are pointing at.
gui.workers.command.tooltip.place_storag: Places a Storage Area on the position you are pointing at.
gui.workers.command.tooltip.place_animal: Places a Animal Pen on the position you are pointing at.
gui.workers.command.tooltip.place_market: Places a Market Area on the position you are pointing at.
gui.workers.checkbox.tooltip.useVehicleI: If true the items will be filled in the vehicles inventory
gui.workers.checkbox.tooltip.cycle: If true navigation will start at 1 waypoint otherwise the path will be followed backwards
description.workers.farmer: Plants crops using seeds from nearby storage and harvests fields when they are ready. Automatically works on farmland within range and keeps crops growing efficiently.
description.workers.miner: Mines a defined area and Places torches while working. Provides safety by filling holes with cobblestone and can optionally cover the ground to prevent dangerous falls.
description.workers.lumberjack: Cuts down trees inside a lumber area and can strip logs or replant saplings when instructed. Keeps forests managed and renewable.
description.workers.builder: Builds saved structures block by block and requires all needed materials. Collects resources from the nearest depot before starting construction.
description.workers.merchant: Trades with other players on your behalf using predefined trade offers. Can take required items from a dedicated depot if permitted.
description.workers.fisherman: Uses a fishing rod to fish in a defined fishing area and casts lines along a set route. Collects nearby fish and items, stores them in a nearby depot, and handles the rod carefully to extend its durability.
description.workers.animalFarmer: Takes care of animals in defined pens. Breeds the animals faster and efficient than a player could .
chat.workers.text.merchantNoItemsLeftOwn: %s: I have no more %s left, i will resupply if possible from a close deposit soon!
chat.workers.text.merchantNoItemsLeft: %s: Sorry, there is no more %s left.
chat.workers.text.merchantLimitReached: %s: Sorry, but now i reached the limit on this trade.
chat.workers.text.merchantNotEnoughItems: %s: Sorry, you don't have enough of %s.
chat.workers.text.merchantCustomerNoSpac: %s: Sorry, it seems don't have enough space in your inventory.
chat.workers.text.merchantNoSpace: %s: Sorry, i don't have any space left.
chat.workers.text.merchantNoSpaceOwner: %s: I need more storage space to continue trading!
chat.workers.courier.sourceEmpty: %s: Could not take %s from %s, its empty!
chat.workers.courier.targetFull: %s: Could not take %s from %s, its Full!
